notableMoments: Hosted the 2010 World Cup - the first on African soil
Siphiwe Tshabalala's stunning opening goal of the 2010 World Cup vs Mexico
The vuvuzela became the iconic sound of the 2010 World Cup
Were banned from international football during apartheid (1961-1992)
Won the 1996 Africa Cup of Nations on home soil shortly after readmission
Only host nation (along with Qatar 2022) to be eliminated in the group stage
